SOC2.name: CC6.1 - Logical Access Control
SOC2.desc: MFA, single sign-on, and endpoint protection must be active for all staff.

SOC2.name: CC6.3 - Perimeter Defenses
SOC2.desc: Vulnerability scanners, firewall rules, and intrusion alarms must be reviewed monthly.

SOC2.name: CC7.1 - Vulnerability Management
SOC2.desc: Penetration tests must be conducted annually and critical findings patched within 30 days.

ISO27001.name: A.9.2 - User Access Mgmt
ISO27001.desc: Formal authorization process and periodic reviews for privileged developer roles.

ISO27001.name: A.12.6 - Tech Vulnerabilities
ISO27001.desc: System patches must be cataloged and deployed systematically based on severity levels.

ISO27001.name: A.10.1 - Cryptographic Controls
ISO27001.desc: Backup files and sensitive transaction tables must be encrypted at rest and in transit.

GDPR.name: Article 32 - Security of Processing
GDPR.desc: Pseudo-anonymization and systematic log auditing must be enforced on user database assets.

GDPR.name: Article 28 - Subprocessor Agreements
GDPR.desc: Formal vendor contracts must declare all downstream subprocessors sharing customer records.

GDPR.name: Article 33 - Breach Notification
GDPR.desc: Formal policies must guarantee client notification of security incidents within 72 hours.
